---
title: "TensorToMask2D"
---

## Overview

`TensorToMask2D` decodes a single spatial channel from a model output tensor
into a `Mask2D` by collecting all pixels whose activation is **strictly greater
than** `MaskDecoderParams::threshold`.

**Header:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_decoding/TensorToMask2D.hpp`  
**Registry:** `DecoderFactory::create("TensorToMask2D")` — `outputTypeName()` is `"Mask2D"`

Dispatched via [`DecoderDispatch`](DecoderDispatch.qmd) when
`OutputBindingData::decoder` holds `MaskDecoderParams`.

## Parameters

```cpp
struct MaskDecoderParams {
    float threshold = 0.5f;
};
```

`ParameterUIHints` in `DecoderParamSchemas.hpp` constrain the threshold to
`(0.01, 1.0]`.

## Tensor layout

The decoder expects a **4D** tensor in **NCHW** order:

| Dim | Name    | Indexed by              |
|-----|---------|-------------------------|
| 0   | Batch   | `DecoderContext::batch_index` |
| 1   | Channel | `DecoderContext::source_channel` |
| 2   | Height  | `DecoderContext::height` |
| 3   | Width   | `DecoderContext::width` |

`DecoderContext::height` and `DecoderContext::width` must match `tensor.size(2)` and
`tensor.size(3)` respectively. `SlotAssembler` sets these from the output slot
shape (last two dimensions).

The selected channel is converted to CPU `float32` before thresholding.

## Coordinate scaling

When `DecoderContext::target_image_size` is non-zero, mask coordinates are
upsampled from tensor space to the original image size by iterating destination
pixels and sampling the nearest source pixel (inverse nearest-neighbor mapping).

When `target_image_size` is `{0, 0}`, mask pixels are returned in tensor pixel
coordinates (integer `x`, `y` in `[0, width)` × `[0, height)`).

## Validation

`decode()` validates at runtime:

- Tensor is defined and 4-dimensional
- `batch_index` and `source_channel` are in range
- `height` and `width` are positive and match the tensor spatial dimensions

Invalid inputs throw `std::invalid_argument` or `std::out_of_range` after logging
at `spdlog::debug` level.

## Tests

`tests/DeepLearning/channel_decoding/TensorToMask2D.test.cpp` — thresholding,
empty masks, batch/channel selection, target scaling, validation errors.

Filter with `ctest -R "TensorToMask2D"`.
